description: Create feature branch and add github.com/siderolabs/go-kmsg dependency
steps: Run 'go get github.com/siderolabs/go-kmsg' to add the dependency to go.mod
Run 'go mod tidy' to clean up go.sum
Run 'go build ./...' to confirm nothing breaks
Run 'go test -race -covermode=atomic -failfast ./...' to confirm existing tests pass
Commit with message: 'chore: add go-kmsg dependency for early boot kernel logging'
acceptance_criteria: Feature branch 'feature/task-kmsg-early-boot-logging' exists and is checked out
go.mod contains github.com/siderolabs/go-kmsg as a direct dependency
go build ./... succeeds with no errors
verification: Run 'go build ./...' and confirm exit code 0
Run 'go test -race -covermode=atomic -failfast ./...' and confirm all tests pass
findings: golangci-lint 2.1.6 (pre-installed) was built with Go 1.24 and incompatible with Go 1.25.1 target. Upgraded to golangci-lint 2.12.2 via mise which is built with Go 1.25.1. go-kmsg v0.1.6 added successfully, siderolabs/gen bumped from v0.5.0 to v0.8.6, golang.org/x/sys upgraded to v0.45.0.
